member.name: T:Sandbox.NetworkStorage
member.summary:
Network Storage client for sboxcool.com.
Auto-configures from network-storage.credentials.json on first use. You can also call Configure() manually to override.

Helpers for writing revision metadata to lobbies. Call when creating a lobby to stamp revision tracking keys that other clients can use to discover lobbies running the latest game version.
Key schema (short names for efficient network transfer): ns_rev — RuntimeRevisionId (0 for editor/local sessions) ns_stale — 1 if outdated, 0 if current ns_grace_end — Grace period end unix timestamp, or 0 ns_mig — 1 if this lobby supports migration, 0 otherwise ns_mig_rev — Migration target revision, or 0 ns_src — Source lobby ID (set when created via "Create New Game")
Frontend helpers for request security metadata used by encrypted Network Storage calls.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.ResolvePlayerName
member.summary: Resolves the local player's display name for analytics payloads. Prefers (active networking session); falls back to the Steam persona name (solo/menu play where Connection.Local is null). Returns null when neither is available.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.GetAuthTokenWithRetry(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Auth tokens can lag briefly behind startup, especially in editor flows. Retry a few times before treating the request as unauthenticated.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.HasDedicatedServerSecretKey
member.summary: True when this process is a dedicated server and a runtime endpoint secret key was supplied. The key is never read on clients or listen servers.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.DedicatedServerSecretKeySource
member.summary: Where the dedicated endpoint secret key was loaded from, without exposing the key.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.ConfigureDedicatedServerSecretKey(System.String)
member.summary: Manually provide a runtime endpoint secret key. This is accepted only on dedicated servers. Prefer the dedicated launch flag: +network_storage_secret_key sbox_sk_...

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.EnsureDedicatedServerSecretValidatedAsync(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Validates the configured dedicated-server secret key against the management API. No-op outside dedicated server hosts. Logs success/failure without exposing the key.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.AutoConfigure
member.summary: Auto-configure from network-storage.credentials.json. Called automatically on first API use.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.TryConfigureFromNSConfig
member.summary: Try to configure from the auto-generated NSConfig class. This provides a fallback when the credentials file isn't available (e.g. non-host multiplayer clients, published games). NSConfig is generated by the Sync Tool with the project's public credentials.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.BaseUrl
member.summary: Base API URL (no trailing slash).

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.ApiVersion
member.summary: API version prefix.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.PackageVersion
member.summary: Network Storage library package version reported to analytics.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.ProjectId
member.summary: Your project ID from the sboxcool.com dashboard.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.ApiKey
member.summary: Your public API key (sbox_ns_ prefix).

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.IsConfigured
member.summary: True after Configure() or auto-config has loaded valid credentials.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.CdnUrl
member.summary: Optional CDN URL for storage reads.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.ApiRoot
member.summary: The full versioned API root, e.g. https://api.sboxcool.com/v3.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.ProxyEnabled
member.summary: Whether non-host clients route API calls through the game host.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.EnableAuthSessions
member.summary: Project flag for fast auth sessions.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.EnableEncryptedRequests
member.summary: Project flag for encrypted Network Storage requests.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.PublishTarget
member.summary: Runtime publish target for Network Storage resources ("live" or staged "next").

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.RequestProxy
member.summary: Delegate for proxying endpoint calls through the game host.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.DocumentProxy
member.summary: Delegate for proxying document reads through the game host.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.IsHost
member.summary: True if this client is the network host or single-player.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.Configure(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Configure the client manually. Call once at game startup.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.SetPublishTarget(System.String)
member.summary: Override the runtime publish target used for endpoint/storage/value requests.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.ResetAutoConfigureFlag
member.summary: Reset the auto-configure guard so AutoConfigure() can retry.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.BuildUrl(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Build the request URL with API key query param (no auth tokens in URL).

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.BuildPublicHeaders(System.String)
member.summary: Build auth headers containing the Steam ID and auth token. Sending auth via headers avoids URL-encoding issues that corrupt base64 tokens in query strings (+ decoded as space, etc.).

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.BuildLobbyMetadata(System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.String)
member.summary: Build a lobby metadata dictionary with revision tracking keys. Pass the result to your lobby creation API (e.g. lobby.SetMetadata).
member.param: Target revision for migration, or null.
Previous lobby ID (for "Create New Game" flow), or null.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.IsLobbyOnCurrentRevision(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Check whether a lobby's metadata indicates it's running the latest revision. Useful for filtering stale lobbies.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.IsLobbyStale(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Check whether a lobby's metadata says it's stale (outdated revision).

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.ParseResponse(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Parse a server response. Returns the response data on success, null on any error. Detects errors via: ok=false, error object, or non-JSON responses.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.ClearLastEndpointError(System.String)
member.summary: Extract and log error details from a server error response. Handles: { error: { code, message } }, { error: "msg" }, { message: "msg" }

member.name: E:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.OnRevisionOutdated
member.summary: Fired when the load-profile endpoint reports an outdated revision, or when is called. Subscribe to show custom in-game UI for revision warnings.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.FireRevisionOutdated(Sandbox.RevisionOutdatedData)
member.summary: Called internally when a parsed server response contains a load-profile response contains a revision block.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.RevisionSettings
member.summary: Public settings for the revision/outdated-session system. Configure these once during game startup.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.OpenRevisionOutdatedMessage(Sandbox.UI.Panel)
member.summary: Open the outdated revision message panel. Requires a parent panel to attach to. If parent is null, a warning is logged and no UI is created, but the hook still fires.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.CloseRevisionOutdatedMessage
member.summary: Close the outdated revision message panel if it is open.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.ToggleRevisionOutdatedMessage(Sandbox.UI.Panel)
member.summary: Toggle the outdated revision message panel open/closed.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.RefreshRevisionLobbyListAsync
member.summary: Refresh the lobby list to find lobbies running the latest revision. This is a stub — game code should override with actual lobby query logic by subscribing to .

member.name: E:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.OnRefreshLobbyListRequested
member.summary: Fired when is called. Game code should subscribe and perform the actual lobby refresh.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.TestShowRevisionOutdatedMessage(Sandbox.UI.Panel)
member.summary:
Simulate an outdated revision detection for testing. Creates a fake with Reason = ManualTest and fires the full UI pipeline: - Updates state - Fires for custom hooks - Opens the default message panel (if configured)
Does NOT require the backend to report a mismatch. Bypasses . Logs clearly that this is a test.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.TestFireRevisionOutdated
member.summary: Fire the event with test data. Does NOT show the default UI — only fires the event so game code can test custom hooks without interference from the default panel. Logs clearly that this is a test.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.GetClientType
member.summary: Determines the Network Storage client type from the current s&box runtime. Editor-launched play sessions can report as false, so this also checks the lower-level application flag and active project state.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.IsEditorRuntime
member.summary: True when running in the editor, an editor-spawned local instance, or against an active local project. A real loaded Application.GamePackage with a revision wins over a merely-open Project.Current, because players can run a published game while the editor has a local project open in the background.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.GetRuntimeGamePackage
member.summary: Returns the package that the engine is actually running, if one is loaded. Falls back to the active project package only when the application has no runtime package.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.GetApplicationGameIdent
member.summary: Returns Application.GameIdent when the currently loaded s&box API exposes it.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.IsPublishedGameBundleRuntime(Sandbox.Package)
member.summary: True only for a real published game bundle, not an editor/local project that happens to share an ident with a published package on asset.party.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.CallEndpoint(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Call a server endpoint by slug or dashboard endpoint URL. Returns the response body on success, null on any failure.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.GetGameValues
member.summary: Load all game values (groups + tables).

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.ComputeProxySignature(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary:
Compute HMAC-SHA256 proxy signature scoped to project + endpoint + client. Must produce the same hex string as the backend's computeProxySignature(). Format: HMAC-SHA256(apiKey, "projectId:endpointSlug:clientSteamId:clientToken")
Uses a pure managed SHA-256 + HMAC implementation because s&box's whitelist blocks System.Security.Cryptography.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.CreateEncryptedRequestId
member.summary: Creates a one-use encrypted request id in "{unixSeconds}_{random}" format. The backend must reject stale or repeated ids before running endpoint logic.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.TryParseEncryptedRequestId(System.String,System.Int64@,System.String@)
member.summary: Validates and parses an encrypted request id in "{unixSeconds}_{random6plus}" format.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.CallEndpointAs(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Call an endpoint on behalf of another player (host only). Requires the client's auth token as proof of consent. Sends: host auth (Facepunch-verified) + client token + HMAC proxy signature scoped to this project + endpoint to prevent cross-server replay.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.GetDocumentAs(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Read a document on behalf of another player (host only). Requires the client's auth token as proof of consent.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.CallEndpointViaProxy(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Route an endpoint call through the game host via the registered RequestProxy delegate.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.GetDocumentViaProxy(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Route a document read through the game host via the registered DocumentProxy delegate.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.SaveDocument(System.String,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Save or replace a collection document. Defaults to the current player's Steam ID. On dedicated servers, a configured secret key is sent automatically so endpoint-only collections can be edited when the key has collection execute permission.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.SetDocument(System.String,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Alias for SaveDocument.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.UpdateDocument(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Sandbox.NetworkStorageOperation})
member.summary: Apply server-side operations to a collection document. This avoids sending the full document and lets the backend validate increments, ledgers, and rate limits.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.UpdateDocument(System.String,System.String,Sandbox.NetworkStorageOperation[])
member.summary: Apply server-side operations to a collection document.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.PatchDocument(System.String,System.String,Sandbox.NetworkStorageOperation[])
member.summary: Alias for UpdateDocument.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.DeleteDocument(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Delete a collection document. The backend must have allowRecordDelete enabled for the collection. Defaults to the current player's Steam ID.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.ListRecords(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: List save-record metadata for a player in a multi-record collection.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.CreateRecord(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Create a save-record entry for a player in a multi-record collection.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.DeleteRecord(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Delete a save-record entry and its stored document data.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.RenameRecord(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Rename a save-record entry.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.GetDocument(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Read a document from a collection. If documentId is null, uses the current player's Steam ID.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.RunQuery(System.String)
member.summary: Run a dashboard query by ID. Public queries use the public runtime key. On dedicated servers, a configured secret key is sent automatically so secret-gated queries can run without s&box auth tokens.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.GetQuery(System.String)
member.summary: Alias for RunQuery.

member.name: T:Sandbox.NetworkStorageAnalyticsBootstrap
member.summary: Extra lifecycle hooks for managed Player Analytics. This makes the runtime start even when project code configures Network Storage before the scene is ready.

member.name: T:Sandbox.NetworkStorageAnalytics
member.summary: Convenience facade for Player Analytics. Methods forward to NetworkStorage so projects can use either NetworkStorageAnalytics.TrackEvent(...) or NetworkStorage.TrackAnalyticsEvent(...).

member.name: T:Sandbox.NetworkStorageAnalyticsRuntime
member.summary: Lightweight managed analytics runtime. Created automatically after NetworkStorage.Configure(). Sends join/leave and a 30 second heartbeat with privacy-safe s&box/runtime telemetry.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorageAnalyticsRuntime.CurrentSessionId
member.summary: The current process-stable session id (for analytics event enrichment). Null until the runtime has initialized.

member.name: T:Sandbox.JsonHelpers
member.summary: Shared JSON deserialization helpers for Network Storage responses. Handles type coercion (string → number), missing keys, and fallback defaults.

member.name: M:Sandbox.JsonHelpers.GetInt(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get an integer from a JSON element, with fallback.

member.name: M:Sandbox.JsonHelpers.GetFloat(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Get a float from a JSON element, with fallback.

member.name: M:Sandbox.JsonHelpers.GetString(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get a string from a JSON element, with fallback.

member.name: M:Sandbox.JsonHelpers.GetBool(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Get a bool from a JSON element, with fallback.

member.name: T:Sandbox.NetLog
member.summary: Static ring buffer that captures Network Storage events for in-game debug windows. Used internally by NetworkStorage and available for game code to log custom events.

member.name: T:Sandbox.NetworkStorageBootstrap
member.summary:
Checks whether the editor assembly loaded after the Code assembly. Called from NetworkStorage.AutoConfigure() on first use.
Only warns in editor context when auto-configure fails — at runtime (published games) the client auto-configures from the credentials JSON and the editor is not available, so the warning is suppressed.

member.name: T:Sandbox.NetworkStorageExtensions
M:Sandbox.NetworkStorageExtensions.Int(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get an int from a JsonElement, with fallback.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorageExtensions.Float(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Get a float from a JsonElement, with fallback.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorageExtensions.Str(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get a string from a JsonElement, with fallback.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorageExtensions.Bool(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Get a bool from a JsonElement, with fallback.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorageExtensions.ReadStringList(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String)
member.summary: Read a JSON array property as a List of strings. Returns empty list if property missing or wrong type.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorageExtensions.ReadDictionary``1(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String,System.Func{System.Text.Json.JsonElement,``0})
member.summary: Read a JSON object property as a Dictionary with a value converter. Useful for ore inventories: response.ReadDictionary("ores", v => (float)v.GetDouble())

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorageExtensions.ReadList``1(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String,System.Func{System.Text.Json.JsonElement,``0})
member.summary: Read a JSON array property as a List with a row converter. Useful for tables: response.ReadList("rows", row => new OreInfo(row))

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorageExtensions.FindMismatches(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.ValueTuple{System.Object,System.Func{System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.Object}}})
member.summary: Compare local state against a server response and return a list of mismatches. Fields is a dictionary of fieldName → (localValue, serverExtractor).

member.name: T:Sandbox.NetworkStorageLogConfig
member.summary: Controls which Network Storage log categories are printed to the console. All categories default to enabled. Call DisableAll() then enable specific ones, or EnableAll() then disable specific ones.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorageLogConfig.LogRequests
member.summary: Log outgoing request details (method, URL, body).

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorageLogConfig.LogResponses
member.summary: Log response bodies and status.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorageLogConfig.LogTokens
member.summary: Log auth token acquisition and status.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorageLogConfig.LogProxy
member.summary: Log proxy RPC traffic (host/client handoff).

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorageLogConfig.LogErrors
member.summary: Log errors and warnings (failures, HTTP errors).

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorageLogConfig.LogConfig
member.summary: Log configuration and startup messages.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorageLogConfig.EnableAll
member.summary: Enable all log categories.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorageLogConfig.DisableAll
member.summary: Disable all log categories.

member.name: T:Sandbox.NetworkStorageOutdatedUI
member.summary:
Built-in simple in-game UI for outdated revision warnings. Supports two enforcement modes: - Force Upgrade: Warning with grace countdown, Dismiss button - Allow Continue: Informational with Continue Playing primary
Uses for configuration. Subscribes to when is true.
The panel is hidden via CSS class toggling (SetClass("hidden", ...)). A parent panel MUST be provided — the UI does not auto-attach.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorageOutdatedUI.ResetState
member.summary: Reset the popup state. Call this when starting a new game session. This allows the popup to show again even if showPopupOnce is enabled.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorageOutdatedUI.RootPanel
member.summary: The parent panel to use when auto-opening the UI. If not set, the library will auto-create a ScreenPanel.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorageOutdatedUI.IsOpen
member.summary: True when the panel instance exists and is not hidden.

member.name: E:Sandbox.NetworkStorageOutdatedUI.OnCreateNewGame
member.summary: Fired when the user clicks "Create New Game".

member.name: E:Sandbox.NetworkStorageOutdatedUI.OnJoinNewLobby
member.summary: Fired when the user clicks "Join New Lobby".

member.name: E:Sandbox.NetworkStorageOutdatedUI.OnContinuePlaying
member.summary: Fired when the user clicks "Continue Playing" (Allow Continue mode).

member.name: E:Sandbox.NetworkStorageOutdatedUI.OnDismiss
member.summary: Fired when the user dismisses the popup.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorageOutdatedUI.Open(Sandbox.UI.Panel)
member.summary: Open the outdated revision window. Uses if provided, otherwise falls back to . If no parent is available, logs a warning and returns without creating UI.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorageOutdatedUI.GetOrCreateAutoScreenPanel
member.summary: Get or create an auto-managed ScreenPanel for the revision UI.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorageOutdatedUI.ForceOpen(Sandbox.UI.Panel)
member.summary: Force-open the panel regardless of ShowOnlyOnce. Used by .

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorageOutdatedUI.Close
member.summary: Dismiss the panel if it is visible.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorageOutdatedUI.UpdateForMode(Sandbox.RevisionEnforcementMode)
member.summary: Update the UI layout for the given enforcement mode.

member.name: T:Sandbox.NetworkStoragePackageInfo
member.summary: Detects and caches package/revision information from s&box APIs. Used to track which revision is running and to build sync payloads for the sboxcool.com backend.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStoragePackageInfo.CurrentRevisionId
member.summary: The revision ID detected for the package ident, if available.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStoragePackageInfo.RuntimeRevisionId
member.summary: The revision ID to send with runtime requests. This is only set for published game bundles; editor/local projects do not masquerade as the live revision.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStoragePackageInfo.LatestRevisionId
member.summary: The latest published revision ID for the package.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStoragePackageInfo.PackageIdent
member.summary: The full package ident, e.g. "org.game".

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStoragePackageInfo.OrgIdent
member.summary: The organization ident, e.g. "hooked_inc".

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStoragePackageInfo.PackageTitle
member.summary: The human-readable package title.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStoragePackageInfo.PublishStatus
member.summary: The publish status of the current revision (e.g. "live").

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStoragePackageInfo.PackageType
member.summary: The package type (e.g. "game", "addon", "map").

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStoragePackageInfo.IsEditorContext
member.summary: True when running from the editor, an editor local instance, or an active local project.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStoragePackageInfo.IsPublishedGameBundle
member.summary: True only when the engine is running an actual published game bundle.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStoragePackageInfo.RuntimeClientType
member.summary: The client type sent to Network Storage: "editor", "dedicated", or "game".

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStoragePackageInfo.IsDetected
member.summary: True if detection has run and found package info.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStoragePackageInfo.IsOutdatedRevision
member.summary: Latest revision status: true when running an older revision.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStoragePackageInfo.GraceRemainingMinutes
member.summary: Minutes remaining in the grace period, if applicable.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStoragePackageInfo.GraceExpired
member.summary: True when the grace period has expired.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStoragePackageInfo.RevisionAction
member.summary: Current enforcement action: "warn", "block_writes", or "block_all".

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStoragePackageInfo.RevisionMessage
member.summary: Human-readable message from the server about revision status.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStoragePackageInfo.ServerCurrentRevision
member.summary: The server's current (latest) revision ID.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStoragePackageInfo.PolicyGracePeriodMinutes
member.summary: Revision policy synced from server.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStoragePackageInfo.EnforcementMode
member.summary: Enforcement mode from server: ForceUpgrade (default) or AllowContinue.

member.name: E:Sandbox.NetworkStoragePackageInfo.OnRevisionStatusChanged
member.summary: Fired when revision status changes. Game code can subscribe to show UI.

member.name: F:Sandbox.NetworkStoragePackageInfo._cachedPackage
member.summary: The raw Package object from the last detection, if available.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStoragePackageInfo.DetectAsync
member.summary: Detect package and revision info from the current s&box context. Safe to call multiple times — subsequent calls re-detect from scratch.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStoragePackageInfo.BuildSyncPayload
member.summary: Build the package-sync payload matching the backend contract: POST /v3/manage/:projectId/package-sync

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStoragePackageInfo.Reset
member.summary: Clear all cached detection data.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStoragePackageInfo.UpdateFromServerResponse(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Extract _revisionStatus from any server response and update static state. Called automatically by ParseResponse on every endpoint call.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStoragePackageInfo.UpdateFromRevisionBlock(Sandbox.RevisionOutdatedData)
member.summary: Extract revision block from a load-profile response and update static state. Called automatically by .

member.name: T:Sandbox.RevisionStatusInfo
member.summary: Snapshot of revision status, passed to .

member.name: T:Sandbox.NetworkStorageRevisionConfig
member.summary: Opt-in configuration for revision enforcement features. All settings default to false — game code must explicitly opt in.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorageRevisionConfig.EnableRevisionWarningUI
member.summary: Show built-in warning UI when an outdated revision is detected.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorageRevisionConfig.EnableAutoDisconnectHost
member.summary: Auto-disconnect the local client when the revision grace period has expired. DANGEROUS: test thoroughly before enabling in production.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorageRevisionConfig.EnableBlockSavesOnOutdated
member.summary: Set when running an outdated revision. Endpoint code should check this flag before performing writes. DANGEROUS: may cause data loss if callers ignore the flag.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorageRevisionConfig.EnableOutdatedUI
member.summary: Enable the entire outdated revision notification UI system.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorageRevisionConfig.ShowDefaultWindow
member.summary: Show the built-in default warning window.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorageRevisionConfig.ShowOnlyOnce
member.summary: Only show the warning once per session.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorageRevisionConfig.GracePeriod
member.summary: Grace period override (seconds) before showing the warning. 0 = show immediately.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorageRevisionConfig.AutoRefreshLobbyList
member.summary: Auto-refresh the lobby list when revision is outdated.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorageRevisionConfig.LobbyRefreshInterval
member.summary: Interval in seconds between lobby list refreshes.

member.name: T:Sandbox.NetworkStorageRevisionHandler
member.summary: Wires to concrete actions based on configuration. Call once during game startup.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorageRevisionHandler.BlockWrites
member.summary: Set when has block-saves enabled and the client is running an outdated revision. Endpoint code MUST check this flag before performing write operations.

member.name: F:Sandbox.NetworkStorageRevisionHandler.OnShowRevisionWarning
member.summary: Game code can assign a handler to receive revision warnings. Useful for showing custom in-game UI when the built-in console logging is not enough.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorageRevisionHandler.Initialize
member.summary: Subscribe to revision status change events. Safe to call multiple times — subsequent calls are no-ops.

member.name: T:Sandbox.RevisionInitResult
member.summary: Result of the one-time revision init handshake with the backend.

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionInitResult.Ok
member.summary: True when the backend acknowledged the init successfully.

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionInitResult.IsOutdatedRevision
member.summary: True when the server reports a newer revision is available.

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionInitResult.PlayerRevision
member.summary: The revision this client is running, if known.

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionInitResult.CurrentRevision
member.summary: The latest revision reported by the backend.

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionInitResult.Message
member.summary: Human-readable status or warning message from the server.

member.name: T:Sandbox.NetworkStorageRevisionInit
member.summary: Sends a one-time revision-init packet at game startup so the backend knows which revision this client is running. Call once after .

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorageRevisionInit.LastInitResult
member.summary: Cached result from the last successful call.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorageRevisionInit.SendInitAsync
member.summary: Send the revision init packet to the backend. Safe to call even when package/revision data is unavailable — the request proceeds without revision headers and the result reflects the gap.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorageRevisionInit.ParseInitResponse(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int64})
member.summary: Parse the backend revision-init response into a .

member.name: T:Sandbox.RevisionOutdatedReason
member.summary: Why the revision was detected as outdated.

member.name: F:Sandbox.RevisionOutdatedReason.LoadProfileDetected
member.summary: Detected via the load-profile endpoint response.

member.name: F:Sandbox.RevisionOutdatedReason.ManualTest
member.summary: Triggered manually for testing (no backend required).

member.name: F:Sandbox.RevisionOutdatedReason.LobbyMismatch
member.summary: Lobby metadata indicates a different revision.

member.name: F:Sandbox.RevisionOutdatedReason.GraceExpired
member.summary: Grace period expired, revision is now blocked.

member.name: T:Sandbox.RevisionOutdatedData
member.summary: Data from the load-profile endpoint's revision block. Fires when the server reports the client's revision is outdated.

member.name: M:Sandbox.RevisionOutdatedData.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a default instance.

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionOutdatedData.CurrentRevisionId
member.summary: The revision the client is running.

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionOutdatedData.LatestRevisionId
member.summary: The latest revision available on the server.

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionOutdatedData.RevisionOutdated
member.summary: True when the client revision is older than latest.

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionOutdatedData.GraceSeconds
member.summary: Seconds remaining in the grace period, or 0.

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionOutdatedData.GraceEndsAtUnixSeconds
member.summary: Unix timestamp when grace ends, or null.

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionOutdatedData.ServerUnixSeconds
member.summary: Server's current unix timestamp.

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionOutdatedData.Source
member.summary: Source identifier describing where the detection came from. Typical values: "load-profile", "manual-test", "lobby"

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionOutdatedData.Reason
member.summary: Why this revision-outdated event was raised.

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionOutdatedData.EnforcementMode
member.summary: The enforcement mode from the server. Defaults to ForceUpgrade for backward compatibility.

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionOutdatedData.Message
member.summary: Custom message from the server to display to players.

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionOutdatedData.Action
member.summary: What action is currently required: "warn", "block_saves", "block_all".

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionOutdatedData.GraceExpired
member.summary: True when the grace period has expired (from server).

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionOutdatedData.GraceRemainingMinutes
member.summary: Minutes remaining in the grace period (from server), or null if no grace.

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionOutdatedData.ShowUpdateOptions
member.summary: True if the server wants to show update options (Create/Join buttons).

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionOutdatedData.ShowPopupOnce
member.summary: True if popup should only show once per session.

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionOutdatedData.TimeRemaining
member.summary: Seconds until grace expires (negative if already expired).

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionOutdatedData.IsGraceExpired
member.summary: True when the grace period has fully expired.

member.name: T:Sandbox.RevisionEnforcementMode
member.summary: How the server enforces revision updates.

member.name: F:Sandbox.RevisionEnforcementMode.ForceUpgrade
member.summary: Grace period countdown, then block saves/all requests.

member.name: F:Sandbox.RevisionEnforcementMode.AllowContinue
member.summary: Players can keep playing indefinitely with a notification.

member.name: T:Sandbox.RevisionSettings
P:Sandbox.RevisionSettings.Enabled
member.summary: Enable revision-outdated detection and hook firing. When false, no detection occurs and no events fire. Default: true

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionSettings.ShowDefaultMessage
member.summary: Show the built-in default "OUTDATED REVISION" message panel when the revision becomes outdated. Set to true to enable the default UI, or leave false and use your own via . Default: false

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionSettings.ShowOnlyOnce
member.summary: Only show the default message once per session. If false, the panel re-appears every time load-profile reports the revision is outdated. Default: true

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionSettings.GracePeriod
member.summary: Grace period before the outdated warning appears. Use to show immediately. Default: TimeSpan.Zero

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionSettings.AutoRefreshLobbies
member.summary: Auto-refresh the lobby list when the revision is outdated. Default: false

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionSettings.LobbyRefreshInterval
member.summary: Interval in seconds between lobby list refreshes. Only used when is true. Default: 10

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionSettings.AllowSpaceToClose
member.summary: Allow the SPACE key to close the default message panel. Default: true

member.name: P:Sandbox.RevisionSettings.AutoOpenOnOutdated
member.summary: Automatically open the default message panel when the revision becomes outdated. Set to false if you want to control when the UI appears via . Default: true

member.name: T:Sandbox.NetworkStorageProxyComponent
member.summary:
Bridges NetworkStorage proxy delegates to s&box RPCs.
When proxy mode is enabled (Editor → Network Storage → Settings): - Non-host clients route API calls through this component via [Rpc.Broadcast] - The host receives the request, calls CallEndpointAs / GetDocumentAs, and sends the result back - The client awaits the result via a TaskCompletionSource keyed by request ID
Security: The client's auth token is forwarded to the host, which includes it in the HMAC proxy signature sent to the backend. This proves client consent without requiring the backend to verify the client's token against Facepunch (which fails for non-host clients).
Attach to each player's GameObject via PlayerSpawner.

member.name: T:Sandbox.NetworkStorageOperation
member.summary: A server-side document mutation for Network Storage collection records. Operations are applied by the backend against the current document, so callers can update counters and arrays without sending a full replacement document.

member.name: T:Sandbox.SaveStateTracker
M:Sandbox.SaveStateTracker.Call(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Call an endpoint with automatic save state tracking and logging. Sets State to Saving → Saved/Error. Logs to NetLog.

member.name: M:Sandbox.SaveStateTracker.CallAndApply(System.String,System.Object,System.Action,System.Action{System.Text.Json.JsonElement},System.Action)
member.summary: Call an endpoint, apply the result to a callback on success, revert on failure. Handles the optimistic update → server confirm → revert pattern.
